name: Business Registration Number (BRN) Requirements for Toll-Free Verification
body: [{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Overview"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"New compliance guidelines require the collection of "},{"text":"Business Registration Numbers (BRNs)","bold":true},{"text":" for all "},{"text":"Toll-Free Verification (TFV)","bold":true},{"text":" requests. These updated requirements are being implemented industry-wide to meet regulatory standards."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Implementation Timeline"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"September 30, 2025","bold":true},{"text":": Customers can begin including their BRNs in new TVF submissions. "}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"January 2026","bold":true},{"text":": Business Registration Numbers become mandatory for all new toll-free verification submissions."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"New Compliance Fields"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To meet the updated guidelines, three additional fields will be required in toll-free verification submissions:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Business Registration Number","bold":true},{"text":": The official registration number issued by your government authority."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Business Registration Type","bold":true},{"text":": The type of Business Registration Number. Examples include EIN, or CBN."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Business Registration Country","bold":true},{"text":": The ISO 3166-1 Alpha-2 country code (such as US for the United States, or CA for Canada).\nFor more information about other countries’ Alpha-2 codes, please visit the "},{"type":"a","url":"https://can01.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwow.bandwidth.com%2FMzgxLU5RSi05ODEAAAGcBTqeyHoS_hHyFnYbXtDBjTyYO7wdAXBt04GAqSPRp9GZ9LJLTJuRbiYfqUOfepNpgT-q3Hg%3D&data=05%7C02%7Cmanisha%40maropost.com%7C7643915f7b2f4470522108ddeafe9eec%7Ce5e528371e604135adf7d03a14924196%7C0%7C0%7C638925101509821781%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJFbXB0eU1hcGkiOnRydWUsIlYiOiIwLjAuMDAwMCIsIlAiOiJXaW4zMiIsIkFOIjoiTWFpbCIsIldUIjoyfQ%3D%3D%7C0%7C%7C%7C&sdata=j13Dy1WC1wupvS5Cf3LxDR9RKyaAKusm%2F%2BsF5KtH9M4%3D&reserved=0","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"ISO Online Browsing Platform"}]},{"text":", select "},{"text":"Country codes","bold":true},{"text":", and click "},{"text":"Search","bold":true},{"text":"."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Compliance Requirements by Location"}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"US Businesses:"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Provide your IRS-issued Employer Identification Number (EIN)."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"If you do not have EIN issued by IRS, for example if you’re a business with no employees, then mark Entity Type as “Sole Proprietor” - submissions will go through a manual exemption process."}]},{"type":"callout","children":[{"type":"callout-item","children":[{"text":"Note:","bold":true},{"text":" It will require an extended processing time and there’s no guarantee of approval."}]}],"appearance":"info"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Non-US Businesses:"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Provide the official business registration number from your local/national business authority."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"While required documents will vary by country, please ensure you can provide a document that shows:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Your legal business name"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"A valid business registration number"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"The name of the issuing authority (for example, Companies House in the UK, Corporations Canada, and so on)"}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
